name_en: 🌷With full original green box packaging🌷【New】The new GG Emblem series reinterprets the brand's timeless elegance and exquisite craftsmanship. This medium tote bag features an adjustable handle with grommets, inspired by the equestrian world.
name_cn:
🌷With full original green box packaging🌷【New】The new GG Emblem series reinterprets the brand's timeless elegance and exquisite craftsmanship. This medium tote bag features an adjustable handle with grommets, inspired by the equestrian world.
Black glossy leather
Black microfiber lining
Also comes with a D-ring for hanging removable items
Grommet adjustable handle; Height 21.5cm - 31.5cm
Interior: 2 compartments and 1 central zip compartment
Magnetic snap closure
Model: 815213.
Dimensions: 38cm (W) x 25cm (H) x 15cm (D)
Weight: approx. 0.85kg
Color: Black/Original leather.
Made in Italy
